title: OCP Group raises feed phosphate exports as Asian demand strengthens
body_preview: OCP Group announced a significant increase in feed phosphate (MCP, MDCP) exports for Q2 2026, citing strong demand from Asia-Pacific markets…

classification.signal: OCP expanding phosphate output signals continued tightening of feed phosphate supply.

title: DSM-Firmenich and Cargill expand Bovaer methane reduction partnership in Europe
body_preview: DSM-Firmenich announced an expanded partnership with Cargill to deploy Bovaer methane-reducing feed additive across European dairy cooperatives…

classification.signal: GHG regulatory pull accelerating commercial deployment of methane-reducing feed additives in EU.

title: Lysine prices ease as CJ Bio and Ajinomoto ramp Asian production
body_preview: Lysine sulfate spot prices declined 8% over the past month as CJ Bio and Ajinomoto increased capacity utilization at their Asian plants…

classification.signal: Lysine supply surge from Asian producers easing feed cost pressure across poultry sector.

title: African swine fever resurges in Vietnam — compound feed demand at risk
body_preview: Vietnam's agriculture ministry confirmed ASF outbreaks in 3 northern provinces, suspending live pig imports…

classification.signal: ASF outbreak in Vietnam threatens regional compound feed volumes in H2 2026.

title: Mosaic posts strong Q1 results on feed phosphate strength
body_preview: The Mosaic Company reported Q1 2026 revenue beat on stronger-than-expected feed phosphate (MCP, DCP) pricing and steady Brazilian demand…

classification.signal: Mosaic earnings confirm sustained feed phosphate price premium driven by tight global supply.

title: EU EFSA proposes tighter heavy metals limits in compound feeds
body_preview: The European Food Safety Authority opened a consultation on amended maximum levels for cadmium and lead in compound feeds…

classification.signal: Stricter EU heavy metals limits could pressure phosphate suppliers to upgrade purification.

title: India compound feed sector growing 15% as government boosts credit
body_preview: India's Ministry of Agriculture published a 5-year roadmap to develop domestic compound feed capacity, backed by ₹2400 crore in subsidized credit…

classification.signal: India structural feed demand acceleration creates 6-12 month entry window for additive suppliers.

title: Cargill annonce une nouvelle gamme d'additifs pour la santé digestive
body_preview: Cargill a lancé en Europe une nouvelle gamme d'additifs probiotiques ciblant la santé digestive des poulets de chair, avec des résultats cliniques montrant une amélioration de l'indice de consommation…

classification.signal: Cargill renforce sa position concurrentielle sur le segment additifs santé digestive en Europe.
